Let us help you find your financial direction.

ctas.text: Build wealth to reach our goals

Live freely
No two destinations for financial freedom are the same, so the path to getting there shouldn’t be. This is why we don’t offer financial plans that are one-size-fits-all but ones that fit our clients’ individual needs. With the right plan, you can feel confident that your investment selections can help you move towards your goals.
TALK WITH AN ADVISOR
Where should we start?
TALK WITH AN ADVISOR
Future proofing
I’m a lifelong worker who knows that good things take time, but want to ensure my family is set up for success.
LEARN MORE
Build wealth to reach our goals
I want to make our wealth work as hard for us as we did to earn it.
LEARN MORE
Retirement and beyond
I want to have a retirement plan in place for both me and my business, so when the time comes to exit, I'm prepared.
LEARN MORE
Entrepreneurial support
As an entrepreneur, I'm taking on many different kinds of risk, including those that are planned and unplanned.
LEARN MORE
Retirement plan consulting
I’m a business owner that wants to find a retirement plan that works best for my startup or company.
RETIREMENT PLAN CONSULTING
Our goal is getting you closer to yours
Compass Ion was founded on the belief that clients’ interest should be first. We remain neutral in finding the right selection of investments for you. Ensuring you are satisfied and served is our primary incentive.
A guide for good
Since the beginning, giving back has been at our core. Which is why each year we donate 20% of our net income to those who need it most.
LEARN MORE
Meet our advisors
As financial advisors, your best interest is our main priority. Through cutting edge technology, we create customized solutions to help fit each and every one of your complex financial needs and help shift your plan as changes in your life arise.
MEET OUR ADVISORS
Let us help you find your financial direction.
Talk with an Advisor
